jd_text:
Role OverviewThe Associate Vice President – Commercial / Business Development will be responsible for driving revenue growth, strategic client acquisition, and market expansion in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.The role will lead the development and execution of the company’s commercial strategy across integrated logistics services, including e-commerce last mile, fulfillment, domestic transportation, and international freight (air & ocean).The AVP will play a critical role in building strategic partnerships, expanding enterprise accounts, and positioning the organization as a leading integrated 3PL provider in the KSA market.The AVP will work closely with Operations, Finance and KAM to offer competitive realistic proposals to prospect clients.
Key ResponsibilitiesCommercial Strategy & Revenue GrowthDevelop and execute the commercial strategy for KSA across all logistics service lines.Drive top-line revenue growth and profitability through new customer acquisition and expansion of existing accounts.Identify and develop branded/ enterprise clients across retail and e-commerce sector.Lead commercial negotiations, contract structuring, and pricing strategy.Develop long-term sales pipeline and revenue forecasting.
Business DevelopmentBuild and manage a strong pipeline of branded / strategic clients for logistics and supply chain services.Lead solution-based selling by collaborating with operations, solution design, and finance teams.Identify market opportunities in last-mile, fulfillment, cross-border logistics, and freight forwarding.Develop partnerships with regional and international clients expanding into KSA.
Support Key Account ManagementBuild long-term relationships with strategic clients and key decision makers.Ensure the KAM team is driving customer retention, contract renewals, and revenue expansion.
Market Expansion & Industry PositioningMonitor market trends, competitor strategies, and emerging logistics opportunities.Support expansion into new sectors, geographies, and service offerings.Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and strategic forums.
Cross Functional LeadershipWork closely with Operations, Solution Design, Finance, and Technology teams to deliver integrated logistics solutions.Ensure commercial commitments are aligned with operational capabilities and service quality.Lead the development of innovative logistics solutions tailored to customer needs.
Commercial GovernanceDrive sales performance management, pipeline reviews, and commercial reporting.Ensure compliance with pricing policies, contracts, and risk management frameworks.Implement best practices in CRM, sales processes, and bid management.
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)Revenue growth and sales target achievementNew customer acquisitionStrategic account developmentGross margin and profitabilityPipeline development and conversion rate
Qualifications & ExperienceBachelor’s degree in Business, Supply Chain, Logistics, or related fieldMBA or advanced degree preferred12–15+ years of experience in logistics, supply chain, or freight forwardingMinimum 5–7 years in commercial leadership rolesStrong experience in 3PL services including warehousing, fulfillment, transportation, and freight forwardingProven track record of winning large enterprise logistics contracts in KSA or GCC
Skills & CompetenciesStrategic thinking and market developmentStrong commercial negotiation and deal structuringEnterprise sales and key account managementDeep understanding of logistics and supply chain solutionsLeadership and cross-functional collaborationStrong network within KSA logistics and e-commerce ecosystem
Personal AttributesEntrepreneurial mindset with strong growth orientationAbility to operate in high-growth and fast-paced environmentsStrong relationship builder and influential communicatorResults-driven with high accountability
